docs.title: 4k Youtube setup
docs.text: This page will guide you through the process of setting up Youtube integration for OBS and 4K.

docs.title: Steps
docs.text:
1. Create or log in to your Youtube account.
  2. Go to the Youtube Developer Console.
  3. Create a new project and enable the Youtube Data API.
  4. Generate API keys or OAuth credentials as needed.
  5. Configure your application to use these credentials.
  6. Test the integration.

Add more details here as needed for your specific setup.
